title: Senior Doctor - Aster DM Healthcare Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Aster DM Healthcare Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Doctor with drive and ambition, Aster DM Healthcare Capital India in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
